headline: Chipotle Mexican Grill (CMG) Gains But Lags Market: What You Should Know
summary: In the closing of the recent trading day, Chipotle Mexican Grill (CMG) stood at $31.96, denoting a +2.55% move from the preceding trading day.

headline: Jim Cramer on Chipotle Mexican Grill: “It’s Got to Show Some Better-Than-Expected Numbers, and It Hasn’t Been Able to Do That Yet”
summary: Jim Cramer gave top insight on Chipotle Mexican Grill, Inc. (NYSE:CMG), sharing a game plan of what to buy, sell, and hold right now. During the episode, a caller asked for Cramer’s thoughts on the company, and he said: Man, I gotta tell you, I thought candidly it was going to hold at this level. […]

headline: CAVA's EBITDA Growth Lags Revenues: Investment Phase or Margin Risk?
summary: CAVA's revenue growth outpaces EBITDA as expansion spending and rising operating costs continue to limit margin flow-through.

headline: What Offers Chipotle Mexican Grill (CMG) a Long Runway for Growth?
summary: Parnassus Investments, an investment management company, released the “Parnassus Mid Cap Fund” fourth-quarter 2025 investor letter. A copy of the letter is available to download here. The Q4 2025 marked the fund’s consecutive quarter of outperformance, returning 1.17% (net of fees) in the quarter, surpassing 0.16% return for the Russell Midcap Index. The performance was […]
